homepage.heroSubline: Building and renovating homes with integrity and skill. Serving Nashville, Franklin, and surrounding areas.
homepage.aboutTitle: Building Nashville, One Project at a Time
aboutText: Echo Construction LLC was founded in Nashville over a decade ago, born from a passion for quality craftsmanship and a desire to build lasting relationships with our clients. We've grown from a small team to a dedicated crew of skilled professionals, all committed to exceeding expectations.

Our approach is simple: listen to our clients, understand their vision, and execute with precision. We value clear communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to staying on schedule. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and attention to detail.

We're proud to be a part of the Nashville community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities. We believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Nashville home.
services.description:
The kitchen is more than just a place to cook; it's a gathering space, a place for memories, and often the focal point of your home. Echo Construction specializes in creating kitchens that are both beautiful and functional. Whether you're dreaming of a complete overhaul or a simple refresh, we can bring your vision to life. We handle every aspect of the project, from initial design and layout to cabinet installation, countertop selection, and appliance upgrades. 

Considering Nashville's diverse architectural styles, we tailor each kitchen remodel to complement your home's existing character. From modernizing a 1920s bungalow in East Nashville to updating a suburban ranch in Brentwood, we have the expertise to seamlessly integrate your new kitchen. We also understand the importance of durable materials that can withstand daily use. 

Our kitchen remodeling services include custom cabinetry, granite and quartz countertop installation, backsplash design and installation, flooring upgrades, lighting solutions, and appliance installation. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation & Design – We discuss your needs, budget, and design preferences.
Step 2: Detailed Planning & Budgeting – We create a detailed plan and budget for your project.
Step 3: Demolition & Construction – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the demolition and construction process.
Step 4: Final Touches & Inspection – We ensure every detail is perfect before the final inspection.

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 6-12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the planning phase.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: It's possible to live in your home during a kitchen remodel, but it can be disruptive. We take measures to minimize dust and noise, but you may want to consider alternative living arrangements.

faq.question: What is the cost of a kitchen remodel?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials you choose. We offer free estimates to help you plan your budget.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a relaxing and functional bathroom oasis in your Nashville home.
services.description:
Your bathroom should be a haven, a place to relax and rejuvenate. Echo Construction specializes in bathroom remodels that combine beauty, functionality, and durability. Whether you're looking to update a dated bathroom or create a luxurious spa-like retreat, we can help. We handle all aspects of the project, from plumbing and electrical work to tile installation and fixture upgrades.

We understand the challenges of remodeling bathrooms in older Nashville homes. From dealing with outdated plumbing to navigating tight spaces, our experienced team has the expertise to overcome any obstacle. We also understand the importance of moisture control in bathrooms, especially given Nashville's humid climate. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to prevent mold and mildew.

Our bathroom remodeling services include custom vanities, shower and tub installation, tile flooring and wall installation, toilet and sink replacement, lighting and ventilation upgrades, and plumbing and electrical work. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your vision, budget, and desired features for your new bathroom.
Step 2: Detailed Planning & Budgeting – We create a comprehensive plan and budget for your project.
Step 3: Demolition & Construction – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the demolition and construction process with minimal disruption.
Step 4: Final Inspection & Walkthrough – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product.

faq.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take?
faq.answer: Most bathroom remodels take between 3-8 weeks, depending on the scope of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the planning phase.

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is a popular choice for bathrooms because it's durable, water-resistant, and easy to clean. Natural stone tiles can also be a beautiful option, but they require more maintenance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases you will need a permit for a bathroom remodel, especially if you're making changes to the plumbing or electrical systems. We handle all necessary permit applications.

services.name: Whole House Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire Nashville home with our comprehensive remodeling services.
services.description:
Is your Nashville home in need of a complete makeover? Echo Construction specializes in whole house remodeling, transforming outdated spaces into modern, comfortable, and functional living environments. Whether you're looking to update the entire interior, add an addition, or renovate the exterior, we have the expertise to handle every aspect of the project.

We understand the unique challenges of whole house remodeling in Nashville, from coordinating multiple trades to managing complex timelines. Our experienced project managers will work closely with you to ensure that your project is completed on time and within budget. We also understand the importance of preserving the character of older homes while incorporating modern amenities.

Our whole house remodeling services include kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, basement finishing, attic conversions, room additions, exterior renovations, and more. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation & Planning – We discuss your goals, budget, and timeline for the project.
Step 2: Design Development & Permitting – We create detailed designs and obtain all necessary permits.
Step 3: Construction & Project Management – Our skilled team manages all aspects of the construction process.
Step 4: Final Walkthrough & Completion – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product.

faq.question: How long does a whole house remodel take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most whole house remodels take between 6-18 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the planning phase.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during a whole house remodel?
faq.answer: It's highly recommended that you move out during a whole house remodel, as the construction process can be disruptive and create unsafe living conditions.

faq.question: How much does a whole house remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials you choose. We offer free estimates to help you plan your budget.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Transform your unfinished basement into valuable living space.
services.description:
Unlock the hidden potential of your Nashville home with Echo Construction's basement finishing services. An unfinished basement represents a significant opportunity to add living space, increase your home's value, and create a customized area that suits your family's needs. Whether you envision a home theater, a playroom, a home office, or an extra bedroom, we can bring your vision to life.

We understand the unique challenges of basement finishing in Nashville, including moisture control and proper ventilation. Our experienced team uses proven techniques and high-quality materials to create a dry, comfortable, and healthy living environment. We also ensure that your finished basement meets all local building codes.

Our basement finishing services include framing, insulation, drywall, flooring, electrical, plumbing, and HVAC. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code. We also pay close attention to Nashville's limestone bedrock, ensuring proper foundation drainage and waterproofing.
process: Step 1: Design & Planning – We discuss your needs and create a custom design for your finished basement.
Step 2: Permitting & Preparation – We obtain all necessary permits and prepare the basement for construction.
Step 3: Construction & Finishing – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the construction and finishing process.
Step 4: Final Inspection & Completion – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product.

faq.question: How long does it take to finish a basement?
faq.answer: Most basement finishing projects take between 4-12 weeks, depending on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the planning phase.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to finish my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need a permit to finish your basement. We handle all necessary permit applications.

faq.question: How much does it cost to finish a basement?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials you choose. We offer free estimates to help you plan your budget.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom deck or patio.
services.description:
Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio from Echo Construction. We specialize in designing and building beautiful and functional outdoor spaces that enhance your Nashville home and lifestyle. Whether you're looking for a simple deck for grilling or a sprawling patio for entertaining, we can bring your vision to life.

We understand the importance of durable materials that can withstand Nashville's climate, from hot humid summers to occasional ice storms. We use high-quality lumber, composite decking, and pavers that are designed to last. We also ensure that your deck or patio is properly constructed to meet all local building codes.

Our deck and patio construction services include custom deck design, composite decking installation, wood decking installation, patio paver installation, pergola construction, and outdoor lighting. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your needs and create a custom design for your deck or patio.
Step 2: Permitting & Preparation – We obtain all necessary permits and prepare the site for construction.
Step 3: Construction & Installation – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the construction and installation process.
Step 4: Final Inspection & Completion – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product.

faq.question: What type of decking material is best?
faq.answer: Composite decking is a popular choice because it's durable, low-maintenance, and resistant to rot and insects. Wood decking is a more traditional option, but it requires more maintenance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a deck or patio?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases you will need a permit for a deck or patio. We handle all necessary permit applications.

faq.question: How much does a deck or patio cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size and complexity of the project, as well as the materials you choose. We offer free estimates to help you plan your budget.

services.name: Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your Nashville home with our expert roofing services.
services.description:
Your roof is your home's first line of defense against the elements. Echo Construction provides comprehensive roofing services to protect your Nashville home from the unpredictable weather, from severe thunderstorms to occasional ice storms. Whether you need a roof repair, a roof replacement, or a new roof installation, we have the expertise to handle the job.

We understand the importance of a durable and reliable roof in Nashville's climate. We use high-quality roofing materials that are designed to withstand the elements and last for years to come. We also ensure that your roof is properly installed to meet all local building codes.

Our roofing services include roof repair, roof replacement, new roof installation, shingle roofing, metal roofing, flat roofing, and roof inspections. We work with trusted local suppliers to source high-quality materials at competitive prices. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure that your project is completed to code.
process: Step 1: Roof Inspection – We conduct a thorough inspection of your roof to assess its condition.
Step 2: Estimate & Planning – We provide a detailed estimate and plan for your roofing project.
Step 3: Roofing Installation or Repair – Our skilled team handles all aspects of the roofing installation or repair process.
Step 4: Final Inspection & Cleanup – We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished product and clean up the job site.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a new roof?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a new roof include leaks, missing shingles, damaged flashing, and excessive granule loss.

faq.question: What type of roofing material is best?
faq.answer: Asphalt shingles are a popular choice because they're affordable and durable. Metal roofing is a more expensive option, but it's also more durable and long-lasting.

faq.question: How long does a new roof last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a roof depends on the type of roofing material and the quality of the installation. Asphalt shingle roofs typically last 20-30 years, while metal roofs can last 50 years or more.

serviceAreas.content:
Echo Construction LLC is proud to offer our comprehensive general contractor services to the residents and businesses of Franklin, Tennessee. Known for its charming historic downtown and stunning antebellum homes, Franklin presents unique construction and renovation opportunities. We understand the importance of preserving the architectural heritage of this area while incorporating modern amenities and functionality. Our team has extensive experience working on historic properties, ensuring that your project is completed with the utmost care and attention to detail.

We also cater to the needs of homeowners in newer developments throughout Franklin. Whether you're looking to build a custom home, remodel your kitchen, or add an addition to your existing property, Echo Construction LLC has the expertise to bring your vision to life. We are familiar with the challenges presented by the hot, humid summers of Tennessee and can recommend building materials and techniques that will ensure your home is energy-efficient and comfortable year-round. We specialize in outdoor living spaces to enjoy the Tennessee climate.

From design to completion, we are committed to providing exceptional service and quality craftsmanship. Let Echo Construction LLC be your trusted partner for all your construction needs in Franklin.
serviceAreas.localContext: Franklin is a vibrant city known for its historic downtown, antebellum homes, and thriving arts and culture scene. The area experiences hot, humid summers and mild winters.

Whether you're looking to build a new home, renovate your existing space, or add an addition, Echo Construction LLC has the experience and expertise to handle your project. With the hot, humid summers, we can design and build outdoor living spaces to extend your enjoyment of your property.

From initial consultation to final inspection, we are committed to providing exceptional customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Echo Construction LLC be your trusted partner for all your construction needs in Murfreesboro.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Echo Construction did an amazing job with our kitchen remodel! From the initial consultation to the final walkthrough, they were professional, responsive, and attentive to detail. Our new kitchen is beautiful and functional, and we couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We hired Echo Construction to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very pleased with the results. The team was skilled and efficient, and they communicated effectively throughout the project. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they were quick to address them and ensure our satisfaction.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Echo Construction transformed our unfinished basement into a beautiful and functional living space. They were professional, reliable, and easy to work with. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Michael L.
reviews.text: We hired Echo Construction to build a new deck in our backyard, and we're thrilled with the results. The deck is beautiful, sturdy, and perfectly suited to our needs. The team was professional and efficient, and they completed the project on time and within budget.

reviews.name: Ashley P.
reviews.text: Echo Construction repaired a leak in our roof after a recent storm. They were responsive, professional, and reasonably priced. We appreciate their quick and efficient service!

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: We undertook a whole house remodel with Echo Construction. It was a significant undertaking, but they managed it expertly. Our 1930s bungalow in East Nashville feels brand new while retaining its original charm. Excellent communication throughout the project!
